steps.title: Use the perimeter scale factor
steps.content: For similar triangles, corresponding side lengths and perimeters have the same scale factor. The table gives perimeters $50$ and $150$, so the scale factor from triangle $TUV$ to triangle $XYZ$ is $$\frac{150}{50}=3$$

steps.title: Scale the corresponding side
steps.content: Since $TU$ corresponds to $XY$ and $TU=6$, multiply by the scale factor: $$XY=6\cdot 3=18$$ The answer is C.
